results.description: saf/ pub fn return types must be declared in api/types/ (when spi/ is absent)

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `TonicGrpcClient` which is not declared in api/types/ — concrete return types must come from api/types/
violations.expected: Declare the return type in src/api/types/ and re-export it from saf/
violations.fix_hint: Create src/api/types/tonicgrpcclient.rs with `pub struct/enum TonicGrpcClient` and add it to api/types/mod.rs
